title: Institutional Flow [EXCAVO]
author: EXCAVO
summary_bullets: TradingView indicator: Institutional Flow [EXCAVO] by EXCAVO.

Structure-Driven Order Block and Inefficiency Mapping with Two-Phase OB Lifecycle The Institutional Flow indicator detects market structure shifts and uses them to generate order blocks and fair value gaps automatically.

Unlike implementations that treat these components independently, this indicator builds them as a causal chain - structure breaks create order blocks, and the OB lifecycle determines whether a zone acts as support, resistance, or a polarity flip.
